block.title: Agent-Native Mail
block.summary: Agent-Native Mail Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

stateFixtures.loading: Agent-Native Mail includes the loading state.
stateFixtures.empty: No records are loaded in the local aggregate Studio pack; install the workspace graph or open the Agent-Native gateway to run the actual apps.

stateFixtures.long-content: The Agent-Native Studio pack keeps every public template app installable as one graph while the actual React apps run through the Agent-Native gateway and Harness owns governance.
